subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the presence of Bahá unto him who hath desired his Lord in both the latter and former days, and who hath rent asunder the veils of glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی البهاء الی الذی اراد ربه فی الاخره و الاولی و شق سبحات الجلال
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God
